en.name: Nonogram
en.desc: Also known as Picross! Use number clues to fill in squares and reveal a hidden pixel art picture. A perfect blend of logic and creativity.
en.howToPlay: Numbers indicate consecutive filled cells in that row/column. Multiple numbers mean separate groups with at least one empty cell between them. Click to fill or X to mark empty cells.
tips: Start with the largest numbers that nearly fill a row/column
Look for rows/columns where only one arrangement is possible
Mark definitely empty cells with X to help visualize

zh.name: 数织
zh.desc: 又称像素填色！根据数字提示填充方格，揭示隐藏的像素艺术图片。逻辑与创意的完美结合。
zh.howToPlay: 数字表示该行/列中连续填充的单元格。多个数字表示分开的组，组之间至少有一个空单元格。点击填充，X标记空单元格。
tips: 从几乎填满一行/列的最大数字开始
寻找只有一种排列可能的行/列
用X标记确定空的单元格以帮助可视化
在行和列之间交叉参考
